---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Description
A clear and concise description of what the feature is about.

## Use Case
Explain the use case and why this feature would be valuable:
- What problem does it solve?
- Who would benefit?
- Any real-world examples?

## Proposed Solution
Describe your idea for the solution:
- Approach/algorithm
- Integration points
- Potential implementation details

## Alternative Approaches
Are there other ways to achieve this? Describe them:
- Alternative 1
- Alternative 2

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, diagrams, or references here.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have checked if this feature is already planned in [ROADMAP.md](../docs/ROADMAP.md)
- [ ] I have searched for similar feature requests
- [ ] This aligns with the project's goals
